ab: Manias mundipa-a ang mabaliv i davustilas i, uka in mita davustilas.
ch: W:Manias，去買米酒，我們沒有米酒了。
en: Manias, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: Heza ang haan pipit-e-an ta tu tas-apaan, ka-a in mabaliv!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: Mavai kis lusqa tas-apaan, matikhiva ang mabaliv tu dusapaan.
ch: W:只有一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: Heza mu-u davustilas? na asa saak mabaliv.
ch: M:你們有米酒嗎?我要買米酒。
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: Heza! Na piaq su-u balivun tu?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: Na mabaliv saak dusapaan tu davustilas, heza ang sia tilas tu tastubutiqu.
ch: M:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: Handii ka tilas un, heza ang su-u na asa-un mabaliv?
ch: W:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: Asa saak mabaliv i nibu, heza?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: Uka in a nibu, aminun in duma mabaliv.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: Asa saak mabaliv hulus.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: Maku-aq su-u asa-un?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: Sia naak hulusputul a asa-un mabaliv.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: Maku-aq sia dii madanqas un?
en: How about this red one?

ab: Heza ang nopa duma?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: Heza ang naam a maduqlas amin malenqas.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: Si-a-av i malenqas hulus tu tas-a.
ch: M:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Manias, se-isaq asu sangan ang? pistalbuqtalbuq asu?
ch: W:Manias你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: Manias, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: Ni-i, mindangaz saak qudas naak mapababaliv sanglav tun.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: Mopa ta qan a, Duuq heza su-u al-u-an is sanavan in? Kuskun ata ma-un i petusanavan.
ch: W:這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯。
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: Na ni-i tu maqtu ki, na mabaliv ang saak hulus.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: Na taskun saak su-u mundiip.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: Temibabalivan, piaq suidaing a sanglav un tas-alinuqus is balivun?
ch: M:老闆，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: Mapusansuidaing a sanglav is tas-a linuqus balivun.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: Piaq suidaing a hutan is balivun?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: Mati-unsuidaing is tas-atingting a hutan balivun.
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: Siza saak sanglav tu dusalinuqus heza ang hutan tu tas-atingting.
ch: M:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
